scripts.deploy:staging: npm run switch:staging && cd Pengawas && clasp push
scripts.deploy:prod: npm run switch:prod && cd Pengawas && clasp push
scripts.release:prod: npm run switch:prod && cd Pengawas && clasp push && clasp deploy --description "Production release"
scripts.watch:staging: npm run switch:staging && cd Pengawas && clasp push --watch
scripts.release:staging: npm run switch:staging && cd Pengawas && clasp push && clasp deploy --description "Staging release"
